testCases.title: Verify navigation to Gumroad via 'Get Started Now' link
steps: Verification: Expect URL to start with 'https://gum.co/oLpqb'
expected: User is redirected to the Gumroad page for the course.

testCases.title: Verify header and subheader text
steps: Verification: Expect text of locator `page.locator('#preheader')` to be 'A course to help you'
Verification: Expect text of locator `page.locator('#header')` to be 'SCRAPE ANY WEBSITE'

Verification: Expect text of locator `page.locator('#postheader')` to be 'Learn how to build your own web scrapers and
start collecting the data you need.'
expected: Header and subheader texts are displayed correctly.

testCases.title: Verify footer text
steps: Verification: Expect text of locator `page.locator('#footer-content')` to be '© Hartley Brody'
